disclaimer.title: Terms of Use & Liability Disclaimer
disclaimer.updated: Terms updated — please review the changes below.
disclaimer.point1: This software controls physical devices that interact with the human body.
disclaimer.point2: Incorrect configuration, network failures, software bugs, or connection loss could result in unexpected device behavior.
disclaimer.point3: You are solely responsible for safe use, including proper device selection, intensity limits, emergency stop accessibility, and physical safety precautions.
disclaimer.point4: Electrical stimulation (e-stim) devices carry specific risks including cardiac events, burns, and muscle injury — you accept full responsibility for understanding these risks before enabling e-stim providers.
disclaimer.point5: The developers, contributors, and maintainers accept no liability for injury, harm, damage, or any other consequence resulting from use of this software.
disclaimer.point6: You must ensure all participants provide informed consent before participating in any room session.
disclaimer.point7: The software is provided "AS IS" without warranty of any kind, express or implied, including but not limited to fitness for a particular purpose.
disclaimer.point8: You are responsible for compliance with all applicable laws in your jurisdiction.
disclaimer.point9: This platform is intended for use by adults of legal age in your jurisdiction.
disclaimer.checkbox: I have read and accept these terms
disclaimer.mustScroll: Please scroll to the bottom and read all terms before accepting.

guestLobby.title: Before You Join
guestLobby.body: This room includes intimate device control. You must be of legal age in your jurisdiction to participate.
guestLobby.detail: By joining, you acknowledge that connected devices may respond to commands from you and other participants. The room host is responsible for device configuration and safety settings.
guestLobby.leave: If you are uncomfortable at any time, you can leave the room immediately.
